text:
Created attachment 220163
svn .diff

Port Update 1.4 -> 1.4.1

This project has not a changelog or release notes (I think it is too small for a changelog).

I released this version to address:

 * ports r554902 fixed in upstream [0], so delete files/patch-Makefile
 * bug #250835 fixed in upstream [1] and adding NCURSES_PORT Option


Testing:
 
 * port test
 * portlint -C
 * poudriere testport -j 122Ramd64 -p default -i -o audio/mixertui


[0] https://gitlab.com/alfix/mixertui/-/commit/4198e2a44ef1b3d66a1cb30ecf43667bad124936
[1] https://gitlab.com/alfix/mixertui/-/commit/8208db2dc3c968e99200021bcefa748ec7e38819
